name: Realfiction Holding AB (publ)
summary: Realfiction Holding AB (publ) manufactures and sells mixed reality solutions for retail, education, events, and brand activations worldwide. The company offers Dreamoc HD3, a platform for grabbing attention in commercial setting; DeepFrame, a mixed-reality display system; Dreamoc POP3, a display to create attention around a campaign or product launch; Dreamoc XL3; and Dreamoc XL4, a high-quality 3D holographic display that creates an eye-catching visual experience. It also provides Dreamoc XXL3, a mixed reality display and optimal solution for creating experiences in environments, such as malls, museums, and busy trade fairs; and Dreamoc Diamond, a display solutions for events and brand activations in shopping malls, trade fairs, and other traffic locations. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Copenhagen, Denmark.
